title: Xautoを呼び出して
summary_text: **作業レポート** 目的を「Codex 主導の Claude-free orchestration を local runner だけでなく fugue の既定経路まで通すこと」と置くなら、現在の達成度は `100%`、到達までの残りは `0スライス` です。 既定 assist を `none` に統一し、baseline gate を assist-aware に揃えました。主な変更は [orchestrator-policy.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/orchestrator-policy.sh:24), [build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh:9), [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:13), [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh:46), [resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh:79), [generate-tutti-comment.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/generate-tutti-comment.sh:88) です。CI/handoff 側の既定値も [gha24](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/gha24:280), [run-canary.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/run-canary.sh:305), [sim-orchestrator-switch.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/sim-orchestrator-switch.sh:147) まで `none` に寄せました。テスト契約も [test-orchestrator-policy.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-orchestrator-policy.sh:181), [test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh:88), [test-route-task-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-route-task-handoff.sh:89), [test-vote-handoff-simulation.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-vote-handoff-simulation.sh:110) で更新済みです。 検証は通っています。`test-orchestrator-policy`, `test-resolve-orchestration-context`, `test-route-task-handoff`, `test-vote-handoff-simulation`, `check-agent-matrix-parity`, `test-local-orchestration-consensus-bridge`, `test-fugue-tutti-caller-summary`, `test-kernel-consensus-evidence` はすべて成功しました。加えて、既定の素の出力でも `orchestrator-policy --main "" --assist "" --format json` は `resolved_assist=none`、`build-agent-matrix.sh --engine subscription --allow-glm-in-subscription true --format json` は `8 lanes` で Claude assist lane なしを確認しています。
